ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.

ElementDescription: Sex of subject at birth
Notes: M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: Scale reflecting participant self-report of the level of chest pain at its worst in the last 24 hours
Notes: 0 = No pain; 10 = Pain as bad as you can imagine

ElementDescription: Scale reflecting participant self-report of the average chest pain severity in the last 24 hours
Notes: 0 = No pain; 10 = Pain as bad as you can imagine

ElementDescription: Scale reflecting participant self-report of chest pain interference with general activity in the last 24 hours
Scale reflecting participant self-report of sleep quality in the last 24 hours
Scale reflecting participant self-report of level of physical activity in the last 24 hours
Scale reflecting participant self-report of level of feeling sad in the last 24 hours
Scale reflecting participant self-report of level of feeling angry in the last 24 hours
Scale reflecting participant self-report of level of feeling nervous in the last 24 hours
Indicator of taking medication for chest pain in the last 24 hours
Indicator of taking acetaminophen (Tylenol) for chest pain in the last 24 hours
Indicator of taking NSAID medication for chest pain in the last 24 hours
Indicator of taking opioid medication for chest pain in the last 24 hours
Indicator of taking cannabis (THC, CBD) medication for chest pain in the last 24 hours
Indicator of taking Gabapentin or pregabalin (Neurontin, Lyrica, etc) medication for chest pain in the last 24 hours
Indicator of taking Duloxetine (Cymbalta) or venlafaxine (Effexor) medication for chest pain in the last 24 hours
Indicator of taking other medication for chest pain in the last 24 hours
Other medication for chest pain in the last 24 hours
